children.heading: Filing date for claims
children.label: b Filing date for claims
children.text: Claims must be filed under this section within one year after .August 31, 1954

children.heading: Death or legal disability as affecting payments
children.label: c Death or legal disability as affecting payments
children.text: Where any individual entitled to payment under this section is under any legal disability, payment may be made in accordance with the provisions of subsection (e) of . In the case of the death of any individual entitled to payment of any claim under this section, payment of such claim shall be made to the individuals specified, and in the order provided, in subsection (d) of ; except that no payment shall be made under this section to any individual who voluntarily, knowingly, and without duress, gave aid to or collaborated with or in any manner served any government hostile to the United States during World War II.section 4104 of this titlesection 4105 of this title

children.heading: Certification of claims for payment
children.label: d Certification of claims for payment

children.text: In the case of each claim allowed in an amount equal to or less than $500, such claim shall be paid in full; and

In the case of each claim allowed in an amount greater than $500, such claim shall be paid in two installments. The first installment shall be paid in an amount equal to $500 plus 66⅔ per centum of the amount of such claim allowed in excess of $500. The last installment shall be computed as of , under the next sentence of this paragraph, and, as so computed, shall be paid from the sums remaining in the War Claims Fund on that date. If the sums remaining in the War Claims Fund on , are sufficient to satisfy all claims allowed under this section and not paid in full, the unpaid portion of each such claim shall be paid in full; if the sums remaining in the War Claims Fund on , are not sufficient to satisfy all claims allowed under this section and not paid in full, the last installment payable on each such claim shall be reduced ratably, and, as so reduced, shall be paid from the War Claims Fund.September 1, 1956September 1, 1956September 1, 1956
